name: Sri Lanka Bistake Beef Steak Saute w/ Onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the beef into 50mm slices.
2. Make onion rings with 1 1/2 onions and chop the remainder.
3. Mix together vinegar, salt, and pepper in a bowl; marinate beef for 1 hour.
4. Heat oil in a frying pan until hot. Add curry leaves, chopped onion, and cinnamon stick. Cook until fragrant.
5. Add beef and marinade to the pan. Cover and cook over low heat until beef is tender. Remove beef and set aside.
6. Add onion rings to the pan; stir fry for a couple of minutes.
7. Stir in mustard, stock, sugar, and chile powder. Return beef slices to the pan. Cook an additional 2-3 minutes before serving (remove cinnamon sticks).
